  Create a reward campaign

Create a reward campaign

## Example (cURL)

```bash
curl -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/campaigns \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "x-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY" \
  -d '{
    "name": "Summer Promo",
    "rewardRate": 1.5,
    "startDate": "2025-06-01",
    "endDate": "2025-08-31"
  }'
  
Example (JavaScript)
const res = await fetch("http://localhost:3001/api/campaigns", {
  method: "POST",
  headers: {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "x-api-key": "YOUR_API_KEY"
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
    name: "Summer Promo",
    rewardRate: 1.5,
    startDate: "2025-06-01",
    endDate: "2025-08-31"
  })
});

console.log(await res.json());
Example (Python)
import requests

res = requests.post(
  "http://localhost:3001/api/campaigns",
  headers={"x-api-key": "YOUR_API_KEY"},
  json={
    "name": "Summer Promo",
    "rewardRate": 1.5,
    "startDate": "2025-06-01",
    "endDate": "2025-08-31"
  }
)

print(res.json())

---
